summary: Multiple major medical organizations recommend repeat or 'rescue' doses of antenatal corticosteroids—such as single-dose betamethasone—if there’s an anticipated preterm delivery within 7–14 days. These interventions improve fetal lung maturation and reduce neonatal morbidity and death, supporting continued pregnancy as a clinically sound strategy during such timeframes.
